jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Miniklub
jsonLd.description:
Join the Miniklub family as a SEO Specialist in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Miniklub:
Miniklub is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub!
